items.name: DarkAge Bo Staff
items.description: Slash at your foes with a bo staff to do 15 damage.  Show off your extreme prowess by hitting the 'Q' key to activate the special attack - summon a line of deadly purple flames that will flow in any direction you face.

items.name: Nightfall Blade ┃Code - Nightfall
items.description: Forged in the heart of an ancient eclipse, the Nightfall Blade is a weapon of unmatched darkness and mystique. Its obsidian edge gleams with the whispers of shadows, striking fear into the hearts of those who dare to oppose its wielder. Infused with the power of the night, this blade not only cuts through flesh but also siphons the very essence of light from its surroundings. Legends say that those who master the Nightfall Blade can harness its true potential, casting an impenetrable shroud of darkness that engulfs their enemies in eternal night. Are you prepared to wield the power of the abyss?

items.name: Sword of Unvanquished Snakes
items.description: It's said that Saint Patrick rid Ireland of snakes.  What do you think he did with them?  Put them in the sword of course!  Now you can use this sword's special attack to send 15 snakes slithering dangerously towards your foes.  Also functions as a regular sword and does 10 damage per hit.

items.name: Leaf Cape
items.description: Turn over a new leaf in fashion – our Leaf Cape: fresh style that's nature's embrace!

items.name: Neon Lip Gamer Cap 🎮👄
items.description: Light up your style with the Neon Lip Gamer Cap! Featuring a bold neon lips design and a retro arcade grid, this hat takes you straight back to the golden era of gaming. Complete with joystick and button accents, it’s perfect for those who love to play with style! 🌟🕹️

items.name: Tiger's Wrath Sword
items.description: ROAR!  Attack your foes with the speed of a tiger. If you are able to slay 5 foes with this mighty sword, you will be able to use its special Tiger Raig attack- which lets you slash over and over again and creates a red danger circle that will do damage to anyone within it.

items.name: The Sword of Shai
items.description: Your destiny awaits!  This sword has five different attacks, each does a varying amount of damage- anywhere from 6-12 points per hit.  One's fate is often not clear - so it's fitting that this sword of fate will will obscure the vision of your foes with a sand storm when they get within 20 studs of you.
